name: Update eco news with valid data -- @1.2
fullName: Update Eco News: Update eco news with valid data

steps.name: Given the user is authorized

When I send PUT request to update eco news with id 45 and {"id":"45","source":"https://example.com","shortInfo":"New eco-friendly product launch","tags":["education","ads"],"title":"New eco-friendly product launch","content":"Full article text here","titleTranslation":{"content":"Eco Product Launch","languageCode":"en"},"textTranslation":{"content":"Details about the new product","languageCode":"en"}}
Then the response status code should be 200
And the response should match schema eco_news

parameters.name: data
parameters.value: {"id":"45","source":"https://example.com","shortInfo":"New eco-friendly product launch","tags":["education","ads"],"title":"New eco-friendly product launch","content":"Full article text here","titleTranslation":{"content":"Eco Product Launch","languageCode":"en"},"textTranslation":{"content":"Details about the new product","languageCode":"en"}}

parameters.name: message
